channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BAFNAPHARM] Bafna Pharma unaware of reasons for share price movement
item.description:
Bafna Pharmaceuticals Ltd responded to queries from the stock exchanges (NSE and BSE) regarding significant movement in its share price. The company stated that it is neither aware of nor has it withheld any information or event that could have a bearing on the share price movement. Bafna Pharmaceuticals attributed the fluctuations to market-driven factors, general market conditions, and investor sentiments, asserting that its management has no control over such movements. The company also confirmed its ongoing compliance with all applicable disclosure requirements under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Bafna Pharma responded to stock exchange queries on share price movement.
  • Company is unaware of any undisclosed information causing price changes.
  • Attributes share price movement to market conditions and investor sentiments.
  • Reaffirms compliance with SEBI disclosure regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAFNA PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [VBIND] V B Industries Board to meet May 28 for Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
V B Industries Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Thursday, May 28, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the company's Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Results pertain to the period ended March 31, 2026.
  • Announcement made in compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: V B Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HEXT] Hexaware Brings Back Chennai's Favorite Half Marathon
item.description:
Hexaware Technologies continues as the title sponsor for the Hexaware Dream Runners Half Marathon (DRHM) for the seventh consecutive year. The event, scheduled for July 19, 2026, aims to promote a healthier lifestyle and community engagement in Chennai. It offers free structured training programs and two race categories (21.1K and 10K). Proceeds from the marathon will benefit three Chennai-based NGOs: FREEDOM Trust (prosthetic limbs), International Foundation for Crime Prevention and Victim Care (PCVC) (domestic violence survivors), and Vijay Human Services (intellectual disabilities). Last year, the event saw nearly 7,000 participants and raised over ₹45,00,000 for social welfare initiatives. Nidhi Alexander, Chief Marketing Officer at Hexaware, highlighted the event's community ownership and its impact on fitness and social causes.

  • Hexaware sponsors Chennai's Dream Runners Half Marathon for 7th year.
  • The event promotes fitness and community engagement in Chennai.
  • Proceeds support three local NGOs for social welfare initiatives.
  • Last year, the marathon raised over ₹45 lakhs for charity.
  • The 2026 Hexaware Dream Runners Half Marathon is on July 19.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hexaware Technologies Ltd | Category: Sponsorship

item.title: [EASEMYTRIP] EaseMyTrip expands Latin American footprint with Brazil corporate partnerships
item.description:
EaseMyTrip, a leading online travel-tech platform, has signed multiple strategic Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) with prominent corporate and institutional partners in Brazil. This move reinforces the company's long-term expansion strategy in Latin America, targeting one of the region's most significant and rapidly evolving travel markets. The partnerships, including with AGK Corretora de Câmbio, Neo Sector, and DATAGRO, aim to explore opportunities within Brazil's growing corporate travel ecosystem. Brazil is highlighted as a strategically important market due to its scale, strong travel fundamentals, and increasing digital adoption. EaseMyTrip plans to leverage its technology-driven platform to support the travel requirements of these organizations and deepen its engagement in the market.

  • EaseMyTrip signed multiple MoUs with prominent corporate partners in Brazil.
  • The partnerships aim to tap into Brazil's growing corporate travel ecosystem.
  • This move reinforces the company's long-term expansion strategy in Latin America.
  • Brazil is a key market due to its scale, strong travel fundamentals, and digital adoption.
  • Company seeks to deepen engagement and strengthen brand visibility in the region.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Easy Trip Planners Ltd | Category: MoU

item.title: [RCL] Radhagobind Commercial CoC discusses resolution plans, seeks 90-day CIRP extension
item.description:
Radhagobind Commercial Ltd's 7th Committee of Creditors (CoC) meeting was held on April 14, 2026, chaired by Resolution Professional Mr. Najeeb T P. The meeting discussed the progress of the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and reviewed addendums to the original resolution plans, along with additional undertakings and affidavits. Key decisions included obtaining a legal opinion on all received resolution plans, including a review of bulk transactions, and seeking a 90-day extension for the ongoing CIRP. These matters are slated for voting subsequent to the meeting.

  • 7th CoC meeting held on April 14, 2026, for Radhagobind Commercial.
  • Discussed progress on Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP).
  • Reviewed addendums to resolution plans and related documents.
  • Decided to seek legal opinion on all resolution plans received.
  • Proposed a 90-day extension for the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Radhagobind Commercial Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [MANGIND] DY Captive Projects LLP sells 44.00 Lk shares in Mangalam Industrial Finance
item.description:
DY Captive Projects LLP has disclosed the sale of 4,400,479 equity shares of Mangalam Industrial Finance Ltd through open market transactions. The sales took place on April 9 and April 10, 2026. This transaction reduced DY Captive Projects LLP's shareholding from 80,829,853 shares (5.67% of total voting capital) to 76,429,374 shares (5.36% of total voting capital). The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • DY Captive Projects LLP sold 44,00,479 equity shares.
  • Shares were sold via open market on April 9 and 10, 2026.
  • Holding decreased from 5.67% to 5.36% post-sale.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mangalam Industrial Finance Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [APIL] Parth Avinash Vora sells 1,94,573 shares of Avi Products via Open Offer
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Parth Avinash Vora, a promoter/promoter group member of Avi Products India Ltd, has disclosed the sale of 1,94,573 equity shares. This transaction was executed under an Open Offer through a Share Purchase Agreement on April 10, 2026. Prior to this sale, Mr. Vora held 5.88% of the company's total share capital, amounting to 1,94,573 shares. Following the sale, his holding in Avi Products India Ltd has been reduced to 0%. The total equity share capital of the company remains unchanged at ₹3,30,68,020, divided into 33,06,802 equity shares of face value ₹10 each. This disclosure was made pursuant to Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Promoter Parth Avinash Vora sold 1,94,573 equity shares.
  • The shares were sold via an Open Offer on April 10, 2026.
  • This transaction reduced his stake from 5.88% to 0%.
  • The sale was disclosed under SEBI Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avi Products India Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [APIL] Avinash Vora sells 2,38,615 shares (7.22%) in Avi Products
item.description:
Avinash Vora, identified as part of the promoter/promoter group of Avi Products India Ltd, has disclosed the sale of 2,38,615 equity shares. This transaction, executed on April 10, 2026, under an Open Offer through a Share Purchase Agreement, represents 7.22% of the target company's total share capital. Prior to this sale, Mr. Vora held 2,38,615 shares, or 7.22% of the company's voting rights. Following the divestment, his shareholding in Avi Products India Ltd has reduced to zero. The disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Promoter Avinash Vora sold 2,38,615 equity shares.
  • This represents a 7.22% stake in Avi Products India Ltd.
  • Vora's shareholding reduced from 7.22% to 0% post-sale.
  • The sale occurred via an Open Offer on April 10, 2026.
  • The transaction is a significant promoter stake divestment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avi Products India Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [APIL] Avi Products: Promoter Avinash Vora Sells Entire 7.22% Stake
item.description:
Avinash Vora, a promoter of Avi Products India Ltd, has disclosed the sale of his entire shareholding in the company. He divested 2,38,615 equity shares, which constituted 7.22% of the company's total voting capital. The transaction took place on April 10, 2026, as a sale under an Open Offer through a Share Purchase Agreement. Following this sale, Avinash Vora's holding in Avi Products India Ltd has been reduced to zero. This disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Promoter Avinash Vora divested his entire 7.22% stake in Avi Products India Ltd.
  • A total of 2,38,615 equity shares were sold on April 10, 2026.
  • The transaction was executed as an open offer via a share purchase agreement.
  • Post-sale, Avinash Vora's shareholding in the company is now zero.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avi Products India Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [APIL] Daksha Avinash Vora sells 1,57,340 shares of Avi Products India Ltd
item.description:
Daksha Avinash Vora, identified as a promoter of Avi Products India Ltd, has disclosed the sale of 1,57,340 equity shares of the company. This transaction was executed on April 10, 2026, under an Open Offer through a Share Purchase Agreement. The shares sold represent 4.76% of the total voting capital of Avi Products India Ltd. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, indicating a significant change in the promoter's shareholding.

  • Promoter Daksha Avinash Vora sold 1,57,340 equity shares.
  • The sale represents 4.76% of Avi Products India Ltd's voting capital.
  • Transaction occurred on April 10, 2026, via an Open Offer.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI Takeover Regulations 29(2).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avi Products India Ltd | Category: Shareholding
